Petition To Authorize And Instruct The Executor To Include The Decedent'S Annuity As Part Of The Decedent'S Probate Estate
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Granucci for and with (petitioner) Richard Wall. John Leutza for (objector) Alda Warnagiais. Luther Lewis for Jackson National Life Insurance (JNLI).

Mr. Lewis stated that this court does not have jurisdiction over the funds, that JNLI no longer has the funds and that they are under the jurisdiction of New Jersey. Mr. Granucci stated that the contract for the policy was in California, they have only asked JNLI for paperwork to determine if the funds should be part of the estate or if it was a pay on death policy and that JNLI should follow the order of this court. Mr. Lewis stated that it is possible the parties would acquiesce to an order from this court with a stipulation and order presented to the court in New Jersey. The petition to authorize and instruct the executor to include the decedent's annuity as part of the estate was taken under submission, and both parties were asked to submit proposed orders.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)
